site.name: UNDGRND Movement
site.description: Gold Coast's underground dance and movement studio — where authentic expression meets community.

brand.logoDescription: UNDGRND in bold purple uppercase with 'movement' in white below, accompanied by neon line-art dancers on black background

hero.headline: MOVE DIFFERENT.
hero.body: Gold Coast's most authentic dance and movement studio. From hip-hop to contemporary, we create space for every body to find its rhythm.

about.headline: Born Underground. Built for Everyone.
body: UNDGRND Movement was born from a simple belief: dance is for everyone. We're not about perfection — we're about expression, community, and showing up as you are.
Based on the Gold Coast, we bring together the best instructors across hip-hop, street dance, contemporary, and movement disciplines to create classes that challenge, inspire, and connect.
Whether you're stepping onto the floor for the first time or you've been dancing your whole life, UNDGRND is your space.

values.title: Authentic Expression
values.description: We celebrate individuality. There's no single way to move — find yours here.

values.title: Real Community
values.description: More than a studio — a crew. We look out for each other on and off the floor.

values.title: High Energy
values.description: Every class is designed to push you, excite you, and leave you wanting more.

values.title: Inclusive Spaces
values.description: All ages, all levels, all bodies. UNDGRND is a judgment-free zone.

programs.name: Hip-Hop
programs.shortDescription: Classic and contemporary hip-hop styles rooted in culture and community.
programs.fullDescription: From old-school foundations to new-school flows, our hip-hop classes cover the full spectrum. Learn the history, master the technique, and find your own style.

programs.name: Street Dance
programs.shortDescription: Freestyle, breaking, locking, popping — street culture on the Gold Coast.
programs.fullDescription: Street dance is where it all began. Our classes blend breaking, locking, popping, and freestyle to give you a complete street dance education.

programs.name: Contemporary
programs.shortDescription: Fluid, expressive movement that connects body and emotion.
programs.fullDescription: Contemporary dance at UNDGRND is raw and real. We strip back the formality and focus on authentic movement, breath, and connection to the music.

programs.name: Kids Movement
programs.shortDescription: Fun, energetic classes that build confidence and coordination in young movers.
programs.fullDescription: Designed for children aged 5–12, our Kids Movement classes combine dance, games, and creative movement to build confidence, coordination, and a love of moving.

programs.name: Adult Beginners
programs.shortDescription: Never danced before? This is your starting point — no experience needed.
programs.fullDescription: Our Adult Beginners program is the perfect entry point for anyone who's always wanted to dance but never had the chance. Zero judgment, maximum fun.

programs.name: Performance Crew
programs.shortDescription: Audition-based performance group for dedicated dancers ready to compete and perform.
programs.fullDescription: For serious dancers ready to take it to the next level. Performance Crew trains for competitions, showcases, and events. Auditions held each term.

schedule.note: Schedule is updated each term. Book online to secure your spot.

pricing.note: All prices in AUD. Memberships auto-renew weekly. Cancel anytime.

plans.name: Casual Class
plans.description: Drop in whenever you like. No commitment required.
features: Book online or at the door

plans.name: Weekly Membership
plans.description: Unlimited classes, every week. The best value for regular movers.

plans.name: Term Pass
plans.description: Commit to a term and save. Ideal for dedicated students.

plans.name: Kids Term
plans.description: Structured term program for kids aged 5–12.

trialOffer.label: First Class Free
trialOffer.description: New to UNDGRND? Your first class is on us. No strings attached.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.quote: I was so nervous walking in for the first time. By the end of the class I was hooked. The instructors make you feel so welcome.

testimonials.name: Jake T.
testimonials.quote: Best dance studio on the Gold Coast, hands down. The vibe is unmatched and the teaching is next level.

testimonials.name: Mia L.
testimonials.quote: My daughter absolutely loves it here. She's grown so much in confidence since joining UNDGRND.

testimonials.name: Chris B.
testimonials.quote: Finally a studio that actually understands street culture. Real teaching, real community.

faq.question: Do I need experience to join?
faq.answer: Not at all! We have programs for complete beginners through to advanced dancers. Just show up and we'll take care of the rest.

faq.question: What should I wear?
faq.answer: Comfortable clothes you can move in. Clean, non-marking sneakers are required on the studio floor.

faq.question: How do I book a class?
faq.answer: You can book online through our booking system or contact us directly. We recommend booking in advance as classes fill up quickly.

faq.question: Is there parking available?
faq.answer: Yes, there is parking available at our studio. Details will be provided upon booking confirmation.

faq.question: Can I try before I commit?
faq.answer: Absolutely! Your first class is free. No membership required — just come in and see if UNDGRND is the right fit for you.

faq.question: Do you offer private lessons?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer private and semi-private lessons for individuals and groups. Contact us to arrange a session.

contact.headline: Get In Touch
contact.subheadline: Questions, bookings, or just want to say hi — we'd love to hear from you.

seo.defaultTitle: UNDGRND Movement | Dance Studio Gold Coast
seo.defaultDescription: Gold Coast's underground dance and movement studio. Hip-hop, street dance, contemporary, kids classes and more. Book your first class free.

meta.notes: This file is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all website data. All components must read from this file. Never hardcode business details, program information, colors, or content.
